text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The last race may have left a bitter taste in my
mouth, but I promise to claim victory today.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I am completely prepared. I've done everything I
can to ready myself.
choice_data_list:
Take some deep breaths and psyche yourself
up!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: The time is upon us. Auf geht's!
